entries.title: Lindsey Graham, Influential GOP Senator, Dies at 71
entries.description: Plus, the scales tip in Ukraine, resistance to AI grows, and women hit “prime time” later in life.

entries.title: Graham makes final remarks in Ukraine a day before this death
entries.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham met with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and made public remarks during a trip to Kyiv just one day before his death. Graham said he was focused on advancing legislation aimed at imposing sanctions on Russian oil.

entries.title: Refreshed Apple Pencils may arrive next year with improved repairability

entries.title: Ukraine's prime minister resigns; Zelenskyy shifts several government roles

entries.title: Keystone Pipeline system's operator agrees to pay a $26.9M penalty over a major Kansas oil spill
entries.description: A proposed legal settlement with the U.S. government would require the Keystone Pipeline system's operator to pay a $26.9 million civil penalty over a major oil spill in Kansas in December 2022 and spend about $40 million more to prevent future accidents.

entries.title: How Sen. Lindsey Graham's death impacts U.S. politics
entries.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham's sudden death has shocked Washington, D.C. Political strategist Kevin Sheridan joins CBS News 24/7 to break down Graham's impact on U.S. politics.

entries.title: How Sen. Lindsey Graham's Senate seat will get filled
entries.description: Longtime South Caroline Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham died at 71 after a "brief and sudden illness," his office said early Sunday morning. CBS News' Major Garrett breaks down how his Senate seat will be filled.

entries.title: Democratic Sen. Dick Durbin says Sen. Lindsey Graham was a "fair-minded person"
entries.description: Democratic Sen. Dick Durbin of Illinois joins CBS News 24/7 to discuss his friendship and political clashes with Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died suddenly this weekend.
